insights.action: Rank with JSON profit, then use the final activitiesLog rows for IPR/ACO attribution.
insights.detail: The final per-product profit_and_loss rows sum to JSON profit with zero delta in every analyzed artifact.
insights.title: ActivitiesLog gives the exact product PnL split

insights.action: Do not rank bots by local reconstruction; use it only to catch obvious logging or inventory inconsistencies.
insights.detail: Max absolute graph delta is 8.07; max absolute tradeHistory rebuild delta is 32.28 where logs exist.
insights.title: Graph/trade rebuild are audit tools, not the score

insights.action: Keep IPR target at +80 unless live evidence shows drift failure.
insights.detail: Runs ending at +80 IPR average 7286.0 IPR PnL; +75-cap runs average 6836.5.
insights.title: IPR max-long dominates lower caps

insights.action: Iterate ACO quote size/skew/passive fill behavior around FV=10000; keep IPR carry stable.
insights.detail: Best ACO run is candidate_26_v3_a3b1_one_sided_exit_overlay with 2804.5 ACO PnL, 235 buy qty, 226 sell qty.
insights.title: ACO is the main improvement surface after IPR carry

insights.action: Optimize quote selection and inventory skew before increasing size blindly.
insights.detail: candidate_26_v3_a3b1_one_sided_exit_overlay earns 2804.5 ACO PnL at edge 12.04; 23-bot trades more matched qty but edge is 4.49.
insights.title: ACO quality beats raw ACO volume

insights.action: Steal the ACO filters from bot 04/05 only after locking the IPR +80 base layer.
insights.detail: Markov/adaptive Noel variants show ACO PnL of 2689.9/2448.4, but their IPR PnL stays below the +80 baseline.
insights.title: Model overlays are useful on ACO, harmful if they replace IPR carry

insights.action: Use this artifact as the primary ranking baseline, not the local replay scale.
insights.detail: candidate_10_bot02_carry_tight_mm official profit is 10007.0: IPR 7286.0, ACO 2721.0.
insights.title: Current Noel canonical candidate crossed 10k on platform artifact

insights.action: Do not promote microstructure-only bots unless they keep +80 IPR carry as a base layer.
insights.detail: candidate_11_bot03_micro_scalper official profit is 1542.2, with only 694.6 IPR PnL.
insights.title: Pure microstructure underuses the dominant IPR carry

method: Platform JSON/log artifact analysis. Official ranking uses JSON `profit`; activities and tradeHistory are audit methods.
